feed.title: Watchtower
feed.subtitle: AI-assisted UI/UX design — the things worth knowing this week.

entry.title: Manzela/Atelier — Atelier — autonomous design agent for the Google for Startups AI Agents Challenge 2026. Stitch generates. Atelier asks,
entry.summary: Autonomous design agent that converges on UI/UX through iterative refinement—design-to-code workflow powered by Claude and Anthropic.
entry.content:
Autonomous design agent that converges on UI/UX through iterative refinement—design-to-code workflow powered by Claude and Anthropic.

entry.title: Signpainterreverberation581/ux-collab — Build AI-driven UI collaboration with agent-browser, Figma MCP, and Lucid to turn wireframes into code that matches your

entry.title: melinaclincherbuilt937/ui-prompt-library — Build production-ready UI prompts for landing pages, SaaS dashboards, and components with React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
entry.summary: A prompt library for generating production UI (landing pages, SaaS dashboards, components) with React, Tailwind, shadcn/ui—useful reference for designers prompting AI tools like v0/Lovable.
entry.content:
